question: Using official releases through September 2025, identify the NYSE-listed international EV-focused company that meets ALL of these criteria: (1) In 2023/2024, the Volkswagen Group invested approximately $700 million for a stake in the company (distinct from similar deals with Nio or Li Auto). (2) The founder previously co-founded UCWeb. Provide the strategic partnership comparison and founder background.

### SCHLÜSSELTECHNOLOGIE WASSERSTOFF ALS TEIL DER EUROPÄISCHEN ENERGIEWENDE
Wichtiger Besuch für die LAUDA DR. R. WOBSER GMBH & CO. KG auf der Fachmesse Hydrogen + Fuel Cells EUROPE. Auf Europas größter Fachmesse für Wasserstoff, Brennstoffzellen und stationäre Batterien, die im Rahmen der Hannover Messe ausgerichtet wird, konnte der Weltmarktführer für exakte Temperaturen den Ministerpräsidenten von Baden-Württemberg, Winfried Kretschmann, begrüßen. Der für den Vertrieb zuständige Geschäftsführer von LAUDA, Dr. Ralf Hermann, begrüßte den Ministerpräsidenten persönlich am Stand von LAUDA und erläuterte die Temperierlösungen des Familienunternehmens, die speziell für die Kühlung von Wasserstoff entwickelt wurden. Denn bei der Elektrolyse und Anwendung mit flüssigem Wasserstoff, einer der Schlüsseltechnologien der Energiewende, wird effiziente und leistungsfähige Temperiertechnik benötigt. »Der Wasserstoff als Teil einer bundes- oder europaweiten Strategie zur Energiewende birgt große Chancen für den Mittelstand«, erklärt Dr. Ralf Hermann. »Umso mehr freut es un
[来源: https://www.lauda.de/de/unternehmen/news/detail/schluesseltechnologie-wasserstoff-als-teil-der-europaeischen-energiewende]

### VizieR Online Data Catalog: 7th Catalog of Galactic Wolf-Rayet stars (van der Hucht, 2001) - ADS
References Volume Content Graphics ADS Abstract The VIIth catalogue of galactic Population I Wolf Rayet stars provides improved coordinates, spectral types and bv photometry of known WR stars and adds 71 new WR stars to the previous WR catalogue. This census of galactic WR stars reaches 227 stars, comprising 127 WN stars, 87 WC stars, 10 WN/WC stars and 3 WO stars. This includes 15 WNL and 11 WCL stars within 30 pc of the Galactic Center. We compile and discuss WR spectral classification, variability, periodicity, binarity, terminal wind velocities, correlation with open clusters and OB associations, and correlation with H I bubbles, H II regions and ring nebulae. Intrinsic colours and absolute visual magnitudes per subtype are re-assessed for a re-determination of optical photometric distances and galactic distribution of WR stars. In the solar neighbourhood we find projected on the galactic plane a surface density of 3.3 WR stars per kpc 2 , with a WC/WN number ratio of 1.5, and a WR
[来源: https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2001yCat.3215....0V/abstract]

Das Wappen wird von unseren Experten unter strikter Einhaltung der heraldischen Regeln überprüft und ggf. neu gestaltet. ### 大众美国造假事件
"大众美国造假事件(Mass fraud in America),2015年9月18日发生于美国的事件｡ 德国的“老字号”汽车生产商——大众汽车公司成了“造假门”的主角｡事情要从美国环境保护总署(EPA)发表的一则通告说起｡通告称,大众汽车公司生产的多款柴油型汽车利用特殊软件在美国官方的尾气排放测试中做了手脚,其真实排放水平严重超标｡

input.query: Volkswagen Xpeng strategic partnership 2023 2024 details cooperation

toolInput.query: Volkswagen Xpeng strategic partnership 2023 2024 details cooperation

input.summary:
XPeng Inc. (小鹏汽车, NYSE: XPEV) is the NYSE-listed international EV-focused company that meets all criteria:

1. **Volkswagen ~$700M Investment (2023)**: In July 2023, Volkswagen Group invested approximately $700 million to acquire a 4.99% stake in XPeng (distinct from any deals with Nio or Li Auto). This was part of a strategic technical collaboration framework agreement.

2. **UCWeb Founder**: He Xiaopeng (何小鹏), XPeng's founder and CEO, previously co-founded UCWeb (UC优视), the leading mobile browser company in China.

The strategic partnership includes: joint development of two B-class electric vehicles (planned for 2026), joint sourcing programs for common vehicle/platform parts (reducing development time by 30%+), and collaboration on ultra-fast charging infrastructure (20,000+ terminals across 420 cities in China).

### VizieR Online Data Catalog: 7th Catalog of Galactic Wolf-Rayet stars (van der Hucht, 2001) - ADS
References Volume Content Graphics ADS Abstract The VIIth catalogue of galactic Population I Wolf Rayet stars provides improved coordinates, spectral types and bv photometry of known WR stars and adds 71 new WR stars to the previous WR catalogue. This census of galactic WR stars reaches 227 stars, comprising 127 WN stars, 87 WC stars, 10 WN/WC stars and 3 WO stars. This includes 15 WNL and 11 WCL stars within 30 pc of the Galactic Center. We compile and discuss WR spectral classification, variability, periodicity, binarity, terminal wind velocities, correlation with open clusters and OB associations, and correlation with H I bubbles, H II regions and ring nebulae. Intrinsic colours and absolute visual magnitudes per subtype are re-assessed for a re-determination of optical photometric distances and galactic distribution of WR stars. In the solar neighbourhood we find projected on the galactic plane a surface density of 3.3 WR stars per kpc 2 , with a WC/WN number ratio of 1.5, and a WR
[来源: https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2001yCat.3215....0V/abstract]

input.summary:
XPeng Inc. (小鹏汽车, NYSE: XPEV) is the NYSE-listed international EV-focused company that meets all criteria:

1. **Volkswagen ~$700M Investment (2023)**: In July 2023, Volkswagen Group invested approximately $700 million to acquire a 4.99% stake in XPeng (distinct from any deals with Nio or Li Auto). This was part of a strategic technical collaboration framework agreement.

2. **UCWeb Founder**: He Xiaopeng (何小鹏), XPeng's founder and CEO, previously co-founded UCWeb (UC优视), the leading mobile browser company in China.

The strategic partnership includes: joint development of two B-class electric vehicles (planned for 2026), joint sourcing programs for common vehicle/platform parts (reducing development time by 30%+), and collaboration on ultra-fast charging infrastructure (20,000+ terminals across 420 cities in China).

allOutput:
XPeng Inc. (小鹏汽车, NYSE: XPEV) is the NYSE-listed international EV-focused company that meets all criteria:

1. **Volkswagen ~$700M Investment (2023)**: In July 2023, Volkswagen Group invested approximately $700 million to acquire a 4.99% stake in XPeng (distinct from any deals with Nio or Li Auto). This was part of a strategic technical collaboration framework agreement.

2. **UCWeb Founder**: He Xiaopeng (何小鹏), XPeng's founder and CEO, previously co-founded UCWeb (UC优视), the leading mobile browser company in China.

The strategic partnership includes: joint development of two B-class electric vehicles (planned for 2026), joint sourcing programs for common vehicle/platform parts (reducing development time by 30%+), and collaboration on ultra-fast charging infrastructure (20,000+ terminals across 420 cities in China).

evaluation.criteria: Score 10: Correctly identifies XPeng Inc., cites the official 2023/2024 agreement where the Volkswagen Group invested approximately $700 million for a stake in the company (a distinct milestone compared to Nio or Li Auto), mentions founder He Xiaopeng's background as the co-founder of UCWeb, and sources these facts. Score 5: Provides XPeng Inc. but lacks the specific detail about the Volkswagen investment amount or the founder's UCWeb history. Score 0: Selects another company (e.g., Nio) or fails to link the Volkswagen partnership to the correct entity.
